subcodes.first_line: Say: I bear witness, O my God, to that which Thy Prophets and Thy chosen ones have testified, and to that which Thou hast revealed in Thy Books and Thy Scriptures [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اشهد یا الهی بما شهد به انبیائک و اصفیائک و بما انزلته فی کتبک و صحفک
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
